name: JC Hernandez
subject: Coming to Richmond
body:
---
| | |
---
| | |
---|---|---
| | Peter - I've got some exciting news.

On August 19th, the 11th Annual Defending the American Dream Summit is headed to Richmond, Virginia! This is the premiere grassroots event in the country where freedom-lovers rally together to learn about opportunities to protect and advance liberty and limited government.
[Registration opens today](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=5b2651ac004c5b83a78b243ea722cae44e6d8c464a440ed433dbd6c5ca1cedf97934b31cacf516e2015e85a572dfc83766e3c817634b1971 "Registration opens today"), so don't delay to RSVP for your seat! You will hear from some of the top policy leaders in the country as they discuss what we are doing to roll back the big government policies that have hurt our energy producers, wrecked affordable healthcare, and destroyed jobs. _We will announce keynote speakers soon but you won't want to wait._
[Register for your seat today! ](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=5b2651ac004c5b83d015743e359930bccb576c25601898c8a49ba31986b38f28cecef4e4a42a00670bd4d4fec1914c17ddf9fbfc216c493d "Register for your seat today!") This is a momentous time in our nation's history and our gathering will be a chance to remember why we fight. Just as our fellow Virginian, Patrick Henry, declared "Give me Liberty!" 242 years ago, we will declare our love for liberty this August in Richmond.
[](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=5b2651ac004c5b83017ccd3ddcfe092fb616deec4e139cd28af86f819081aec3cfb675cadb367532560593344f60e5b8b879ea54913ab62d)[**Don't miss out - register today!** ](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=5b2651ac004c5b83ad6eeb46f2dd6279c0e545cd04a2702aacf712eb558a9b44d186b8a2713446d51171fb93f1fc2d2ab072521718555f83 "Don't miss out - register today!")
I hope to see you there,

JC HernandezVirginia State DirectorAmericans for Prosperity
---
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com
We respect your right to privacy - [view our policy](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=5b2651ac004c5b83d32df6725e213ec3e2de84a5c7f72310bb6cb7e5170b6ac632955b0f20d074694d3115ad2aa810865568cb3a068b5da2)
Americans For Prosperity 1310 N. Courthouse Road, Suite 700 Arlington, VA 22201
[Update Profile and Subscription Preferences](http://pages.myprosperitymail.com/page.aspx?QS=330c754b5e92df74e8392541f9e9983387e1801e2427978ea50c4656973098c8&subscriberkey=003i00000262AbVAAU) | [One-Click Unsubscribe](http://pages.myprosperitymail.com/page.aspx?QS=330c754b5e92df74e8392541f9e9983387e1801e2427978ea50c4656973098c8&subscriberkey=003i00000262AbVAAU)

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Donald=20J=2E=20Trump?=
subject: This could be yours, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
But there’s only one. |

Friend, I have so much respect for the American flag -- and for the many men and women who have made sacrifices in its honor. I make it a point to wear an American flag lapel pin whenever I can. And I’d like to offer the very lapel pin I last wore at a rally in the great state of Tennessee to one lucky supporter. Please contribute $100, $65, $50, $35, $20, or even just $5 to be automatically entered for your chance to win the American flag pin. ENTER TO WIN TRUMP'S LAPEL PIN And, Friend, all proceeds in this raffle will be used to keep powering the movement you helped create. Contribute $5 to be automatically entered to win. Thanks, Donald J. Trump President of the United States

ENTER TO WIN TRUMP'S LAPEL PIN

NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, OR CONTRIBUTION NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN. Contributing will not improve your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. You may enter by contributing to Trump Make America Great Again by clicking here. Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking here. Entries must be received between April 9, 2017 at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time and April 30, 2017 at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) winner will receive the following Prize: One (1) American flag lapel pin worn by President Donald J. Trump at his March 15 campaign rally in Nashville, Tennessee and one (1) certificate of authenticity. (approximate retail value $250). The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winner must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit here for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915.
Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.
Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee.

name: Tom Perez
subject: Announcing the Come Together and Fight Back Tour:
body:
I'm excited to share this news with you.
---
**Sign up here to learn more about the Come Together and Fight Back Tour:

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Come-Together-and-Fight-Back1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170410_tp_s2&source=em_20170410_tp_s2")**
Friend --

As Democrats, we believe that every hardworking American should have an opportunity to get ahead. We believe in standing up for working people, that you should get a fair wage for a hard day's work, and that access to health care is a right, not a privilege.

Those are our party's values, and they're America's values -- they're what most people voted for last November.

We need to turn our party around and get back on track to take on Donald Trump and win elections. But that doesn't mean changing what it means to be a Democrat.

We have to rebuild the Democratic Party from the grassroots up to make sure we're talking about our values and fighting for our candidates in every state and every level of government, from town councils all the way up to the President of the United States.

**[That's why, next Monday, we're kicking off the Come Together and Fight Back Tour with Senator Bernie Sanders. Sign up here to learn more about how you can be part of it.](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Come-Together-and-Fight-Back1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Thats+why+next+Monday+were+kicking+off+t&utm_campaign=em_20170410_tp_s2&source=em_20170410_tp_s2")**

Bernie and I are hitting the road and holding grassroots organizing rallies as we crisscross the country from Maine to Arizona. We'll be hearing from folks like you about how we can make the Democratic Party stronger, faster, leaner, and feistier so we can fight for the values we all share -- and win.

This tour is all about you. The Democratic Party would be nowhere without folks like you who sign up, chip in, volunteer, and get active in your communities.

Even if Bernie and I aren't able to make it to a city near you, I want to make sure you're part of the conversation. **Sign up here, and we'll keep you posted on ways you can get involved and make your voice heard:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Come-Together-and-Fight-Back1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170410_tp_s2&source=em_20170410_tp_s2")**
Thanks, and I'll see you out there!

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c937/4067b0a/2ecad8cca/7e738a20/855312715/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170410_tp_s2&source=em_20170410_tp_s2"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c937/4067b0a/2ecad8cca/7e738a21/855312715/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170410_tp_s2&source=em_20170410_tp_s2"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c937/4067b0a/2ecad8cca/7e738a2e/855312715/VEsA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170410_tp_s2&source=em_20170410_tp_s2") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c937/4067b0a/2ecad8cca/7e738a2f/855312715/VEsB/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170410_tp_s2&source=em_20170410_tp_s2"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Jill Vogel for Lieutenant Governor
subject: Jill Vogel Decisively Wins Loudoun County Straw Poll
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Virginia45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100Warrenton, VA 20186
body:
Vogel Wins Huge
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
April 10th, 2017

**PURCELLVILLE, VA -** This Saturday, Senator Jill Vogel, Republican candidate for Lieutenant Governor, won the strong support of Loudoun County Republicans in a straw poll held at the Loudoun GOP's annual jamboree in Purcellville, winning 61% of the vote in a field of three, finishing as the clear choice of Loudoun Republicans with a 35 point margin of victory.This victory is Vogel's third in two days.
Full results were as follows:Loudoun County Poll Results:
Jill Vogel - 61%Bryce Reeves - 26%
Glenn Davis - 13%
---
| This latest victory follows a number of others clearly demonstrating that Virginia Republicans are unifying behind Jill Vogel as their next nominee for Lieutenant Governor.
Other recent straw poll victories by Jill Vogel include:

* [Bland County (Apr. 8) - 70% for Vogel - 43 Point Margin of Victory](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001A75IE5O4IhCs5aBcU2TIAy5-3NpRMg7WCfuk-wjInRd7HU7utQ219CndsDSSVfdFng6QAk26FPkZDe7y1A6ykMFXDtAXRzHy22EQJp8nNXjnjy-ESmjA90XWtuTbicJkDmtEp4jFav_CfyIre_8_F0xgKp6Hr50XoYW_Sq2pfOW_hmk-b8AbBxpUGTRwapBB0LSLDSEzpEjI9BJEm6hvkHhCOx2ZtrDRvUfXKhG0-wM=&c=JlZ7wfz37xcrIZ3eKlMJI_zsUWiO4SVM6n6LEw050os7oAa_oga7ng==&ch=FQC2TnVBKJG12MuIsEHH7ClAunUUIzqmRVNdIQQKumR8drfrCU_qRA==)
* [Giles County (Apr. 7) - 68% for Vogel - 44 Point Margin of Victory](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001A75IE5O4IhCs5aBcU2TIAy5-3NpRMg7WCfuk-wjInRd7HU7utQ219CndsDSSVfdFjKfB0xSRvDeePZt3evl6MgJ3LNfoOa-DhC1b8cx5VPrv0k-g_MXiw8gGH_EZICTlBS6sdzDFSkmnhVImx1GvAOuqluHDGEBrGtYTnUzC5L9OMuFy1Xzm2Pf4-mokWn-5vIlU7YSwJYspbf5finmtTgwo7sfOXoDq8m4QPS9617asgo1VqVywGc2lNeG1wGaQl1U7I6Wy8MU=&c=JlZ7wfz37xcrIZ3eKlMJI_zsUWiO4SVM6n6LEw050os7oAa_oga7ng==&ch=FQC2TnVBKJG12MuIsEHH7ClAunUUIzqmRVNdIQQKumR8drfrCU_qRA==)
* [Young Republicans (Apr. 1) - 46% for Vogel - 18 Point Margin of Victory](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001A75IE5O4IhCs5aBcU2TIAy5-3NpRMg7WCfuk-wjInRd7HU7utQ219CndsDSSVfdFm-AXrwKlKFDcaT3fFmvr09gf976XQJuO4JdveZ6KkKeLizK7nrjRgUhIO_sFAepB0-3el5JRATsJTUYzaqyrdqIzy1ZaXqu8hamFM3e91bCbj9ibBspzqW_N44OAxoMz3kuWf5YZbibBWZNOZhI97BVQaCfXUrdO3pgenQV3RVlmYIjtcrJ1j3U9FB8c85SsJEVD-1GJFO4cmv0JMjGx0Q==&c=JlZ7wfz37xcrIZ3eKlMJI_zsUWiO4SVM6n6LEw050os7oAa_oga7ng==&ch=FQC2TnVBKJG12MuIsEHH7ClAunUUIzqmRVNdIQQKumR8drfrCU_qRA==)
* [Fairfax County (Mar. 25) - 64% for Vogel - 45 Point Margin of Victory](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001A75IE5O4IhCs5aBcU2TIAy5-3NpRMg7WCfuk-wjInRd7HU7utQ219OWJf5nzaPoyt3MLD_qTxJHqJ9SkY1mxPKoxSD-1OSo2-5teSa-MJs6FE1AJLYfnxKaFLFLsp-vRY3PBQlxSZBF5lMzmn3SqmfYswVsNjwEjNcj-E8IKhMVi6ztUxz-3aATA_IUfvXl1xrIGdJJlcaiN0aD7xXDzuaOxef1PwXRagPcRPCatT6f3zJwGaleGRw==&c=JlZ7wfz37xcrIZ3eKlMJI_zsUWiO4SVM6n6LEw050os7oAa_oga7ng==&ch=FQC2TnVBKJG12MuIsEHH7ClAunUUIzqmRVNdIQQKumR8drfrCU_qRA==)
* [Prince William (Mar. 4) - 57% for Vogel - 28 Point Margin of Victory](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001A75IE5O4IhCs5aBcU2TIAy5-3NpRMg7WCfuk-wjInRd7HU7utQ219Ku5ZyW5UYIIJKsy92x0UCCUju8KRJrKk4b9X6StlJyxaVdtrnOWMzXohgMJjwTpdpaNLdBqz7xmgP_gMUrYPsoYy5K8pH3JncwNfZNjmLgF22kzRlmOncmKmNHN3IgEN9Q8uFrn84ANB2LuaPn8YU8qEHObS7sTEAqe7MbMtId5JuTZyPaAIJa4G3bPW4wTDgBGrNvHYywZ8BmqNws8g3O5h1lf7wCmmSq_kzUa4L9u&c=JlZ7wfz37xcrIZ3eKlMJI_zsUWiO4SVM6n6LEw050os7oAa_oga7ng==&ch=FQC2TnVBKJG12MuIsEHH7ClAunUUIzqmRVNdIQQKumR8drfrCU_qRA==)

Vogel said, "I am so grateful for the support in Loudoun. It is hard to win Virginia without winning Loudoun and our campaign is working overtime to engage people for the primary as well as the general election. We are focused on a positive, more inclusive message. We are also focused on real issues that people care about like regulatory rollback, tax reform, government reorganization, expanding personal and economic freedom--in other words getting government out of the way so Virginia can move ahead. I am especially excited about the future of Loudoun."
Campaign manager Pat Trueman said "Jill is the only candidate in the Lieutenant Governors race who has not gone negative and voters are responding to that. Conservatives are unifying behind Jill because she sticks to the issues and always has a message of optimism and moving Virginia forward."
###

---
| |
---
| Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Virginia45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100Warrenton, VA 20186

---
| Follow Jill on Facebook and Twitter for Campaign Updates

clean_body: Vogel Wins Huge | | | | | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE April 10th, 2017 PURCELLVILLE, VA - This Saturday, Senator Jill Vogel, Republican candidate for Lieutenant Governor, won the strong support of Loudoun County Republicans in a straw poll held at the Loudoun GOP's annual jamboree in Purcellville, winning 61% of the vote in a field of three, finishing as the clear choice of Loudoun Republicans with a 35 point margin of victory.This victory is Vogel's third in two days. Full results were as follows:Loudoun County Poll Results: Jill Vogel - 61%Bryce Reeves - 26% Glenn Davis - 13% | This latest victory follows a number of others clearly demonstrating that Virginia Republicans are unifying behind Jill Vogel as their next nominee for Lieutenant Governor. Other recent straw poll victories by Jill Vogel include: == == == == * == Vogel said, "I am so grateful for the support in Loudoun. It is hard to win Virginia without winning Loudoun and our campaign is working overtime to engage people for the primary as well as the general election. We are focused on a positive, more inclusive message. We are also focused on real issues that people care about like regulatory rollback, tax reform, government reorganization, expanding personal and economic freedom--in other words getting government out of the way so Virginia can move ahead. I am especially excited about the future of Loudoun." Campaign manager Pat Trueman said "Jill is the only candidate in the Lieutenant Governors race who has not gone negative and voters are responding to that. Conservatives are unifying behind Jill because she sticks to the issues and always has a message of optimism and moving Virginia forward." | | | Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Virginia45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100Warrenton, VA 20186 | Follow Jill on Facebook and Twitter for Campaign Updates == == | | | Vogel for Virginia | 45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100, Warrenton, VA 20186 | | Sent by mailto:info@vogelforvirginia.com in collaboration with |

name: Mike Swetz
subject: Early Bird Prices are Expiring Soon!
body:
Hi Derek,

Did you see Chairman Forrester's email last week? Were you able
to RSVP to our "Spring to Victory" Dinner with special guest
Kellyanne Conway yet?

Our early bird prices are expiring this Friday ( http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=5MdO6cLza2MazVJVOHyurva-2BR3ZynZFmQQsOtkDLtzhK6jhIpM9-2FPXc-2B7bPYHTWx_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MYE69Jrbrl1ElLHNCvhalx3XxRC9xVel9NTR3SH0UADbg6o0-2FHe-2Fut1xxuV-2BswyuUq6X2yBw2dVxsbEJJsRIARK13CflAEf07JesRxSGaB3F1SIRN9uehRuQuXcI8E857mdVRHUQn8nXw-2BMymzd6Vzw5Cqwd-2BlFeCKyzRSJbVHgQ1mwaMoRn3h3ydz3QSIMUqaNS-2FDP7XrQ-2BMzwqp98w60-2B0x-2B6ggP63V67NovYwmXYATobvYQKxha27sA3-2Fq4tzDAFosA3qKKGPuolhgiEGFUg-3D-3D )!

We have had tremendous response and it is filling up fast.

"early bird" pricing!

VIP packages and Sponsorships are also available.

Sincerely,
Mike Swetz

Finance Director

She has an amazing story and we are excited to welcome her to the

clean_body: Hi Derek, Did you see Chairman Forrester's email last week? Were you able to RSVP to our "Spring to Victory" Dinner with special guest Kellyanne Conway yet? Our early bird prices are expiring this Friday ( )! We have had tremendous response and it is filling up fast. Reserve your seats for dinner on May 18th TODAY ( ) to make sure you get the "early bird" pricing! VIP packages and Sponsorships are also available. Sincerely, Mike Swetz Finance Director P.S. Don't miss out on the chance to hear from Kellyanne Conway. She has an amazing story and we are excited to welcome her to the Granite State ( )! Share your Robly campaign on Facebook ( ) Share your Robly campaign on Twitter ( ) footer image

name: mindy@dscc.org
subject: The GOP is fired up.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
I need you to see what the GOP is bragging about...
---
[****](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/catching-up?refcode=DPE-20170410-Myers-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Hi Team --

I wish I was writing you today with better news, but I had to reach out about why your grassroots support is so important to the DSCC as we help all 2018 Senate Democrats fight and win.

See, it was just reported that our counterpart (the National Republican Senatorial Committee) had a record-breaking fundraising haul in March with 20,000 new donors this cycle.

To be honest, team \-- that's a big new pool of energized GOP supporters helping the NRSC outraise us. And that's before Republicans got fired up to bulldoze the Supreme Court vacancy.

**While we 're not far behind, we do need to generate some serious momentum to catch up.**

[**So we 're launching a grassroots goal of 4,000 donations in the next 48 hours to show how many people are standing with Senate Democrats. Can we count on you to chip in?**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/catching-up?refcode=DPE-20170410-Myers-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Hitting our rapid donations goal is how this team shows we're stepping up to make the serious investments necessary to defend 25 Democratic caucus members up for re-election in 2018.

Because the NRSC is in this fight with Donald Trump -- the President is directly emailing his campaign supporters asking them to outraise Democrats.

Now, we've seen what statements our grassroots supporters can make, $1 at a time.

So if you're looking for a direct way to stand up to Trump and strip the GOP of a cash advantage, this is how it happens.

**Please, help us meet our rapid response goal, team: chip in what you can, put Republicans on notice, and prove that Democrats are stronger for the fights ahead:**

[**http://dscc.org/catching-up**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/catching-up?refcode=DPE-20170410-Myers-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thanks for all you do,

Mindy
DSCC Executive Director

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

clean_body: I need you to see what the GOP is bragging about... "" Hi Team -- I wish I was writing you today with better news, but I had to reach out about why your grassroots support is so important to the DSCC as we help all 2018 Senate Democrats fight and win. See, it was just reported that our counterpart (the National Republican Senatorial Committee) had a record-breaking fundraising haul in March with 20,000 new donors this cycle. To be honest, team \-- that's a big new pool of energized GOP supporters helping the NRSC outraise us. And that's before Republicans got fired up to bulldoze the Supreme Court vacancy. While we 're not far behind, we do need to generate some serious momentum to catch up. "" Hitting our rapid donations goal is how this team shows we're stepping up to make the serious investments necessary to defend 25 Democratic caucus members up for re-election in 2018. Because the NRSC is in this fight with Donald Trump -- the President is directly emailing his campaign supporters asking them to outraise Democrats. Now, we've seen what statements our grassroots supporters can make, $1 at a time. So if you're looking for a direct way to stand up to Trump and strip the GOP of a cash advantage, this is how it happens. Please, help us meet our rapid response goal, team: chip in what you can, put Republicans on notice, and prove that Democrats are stronger for the fights ahead: "" Thanks for all you do, Mindy DSCC Executive Director Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee 120 Maryland Ave. NE Washington, DC 20002 Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
